system.descriptor: Survival covers the ability to endure and thrive in hostile environments, including finding food, water, shelter, and navigating wilderness.
system.uses:
Uses: Finding food and water, building shelter, navigating by natural signs, tracking, predicting weather, identifying dangerous flora and fauna.
Special Use: Track: Make a Survival test to follow a target's trail. Modifiers apply based on terrain, age of the trail, weather, and whether the target was trying to hide their tracks. Each Degree of Success provides additional details about the quarry.

description.value: Survival covers the ability to endure and thrive in hostile environments, including finding food, water, shelter, and navigating wilderness.
